user_notes.fal-ai/kling-video/v2.5-turbo/pro/image-:
★ RECOMMENDED for authentic selfie / head-turn workflows

• Price: $0.07/sec — $0.70 per 10s (audio off). The value pick.
• End-frame lock: YES, via tail_image_url (start = image_url).
• Keeps negative_prompt + cfg_scale (full control set).
• Realism: softer, less-polished faces — reads MORE like a real phone selfie. Strong prompt adherence.
• Best for: KYC-style selfie with a slight head turn + start/end frame.
user_notes.fal-ai/kling-video/v2.5-turbo/standard/i:
★ Cheapest Kling tier

• Price: $0.042/sec — $0.42 per 10s (audio off).
• End-frame lock: NO (start frame only, image_url).
• Keeps negative_prompt + cfg_scale.
• Good for fast drafts / iteration where you don't need an end frame.
user_notes.fal-ai/kling-video/v3/standard/image-to-:
★ Worth A/B testing vs 2.5 Turbo Pro

• Price: $0.084/sec — $0.84 per 10s (audio off). Only ~$0.14 more than 2.5 Pro.
• End-frame lock: YES, via end_image_url (start = start_image_url).
• Keeps negative_prompt + cfg_scale (unlike O3, which drops both).
• Realism CAUTION: 3.0 tends to idealize/beautify faces (fashion-magazine look) — can read MORE AI for a real-selfie purpose. Test on your own image.
user_notes.fal-ai/kling-video/v3/pro/image-to-video:
★ Premium 3.0 — only if Standard shows a clear identity-consistency win

• Price: $0.112/sec — $1.12 per 10s (audio off). 1.6× the cost of 2.5 Pro.
• End-frame lock: YES, end_image_url (start = start_image_url).
• Keeps negative_prompt + cfg_scale.
• Best physics/motion isolation, but a simple head turn doesn't need it — and the face-idealization risk still applies.
user_notes.fal-ai/kling-video/o1/image-to-video:
☆ Superseded — skip unless you specifically need its first/last-frame interpolation

• Price: $0.112/sec — $1.12 per 10s (audio off). Same cost as 3.0 Pro.
• End-frame lock: YES (FFLF), but uses clunky @Image1/@Image2 prompt syntax.
• Likely NO negative_prompt / cfg_scale.
• Older (Dec 2025); its frame-conditioning edge is now matched by V3. No clear advantage.
user_notes.fal-ai/minimax-video/image-to-video:
★ Ranked #5 for head-turn workflows

• Price: $0.50 FLAT per video — billed per clip, NOT per second (5s and 10s both cost $0.50).
• Budget Stability: much of the same temporal consistency + clean lighting as the Pro version.
• Best cheap option that preserves forensic integrity.
user_notes.fal-ai/hunyuan-video-v1.5/image-to-video:
★ Ranked #6 for head-turn workflows

• Price: $0.075/sec — $0.75 per 10s. Tencent's latest (default 480p, ~5s/121 frames).
• Anti-Jitter Architecture: reduces frame-to-frame jitter — crucial for slow, smooth motion.
• Strong Silhouettes: keeps the subject's outline sharp against the background, preventing warp as the head moves.
user_notes.fal-ai/kling-video/v2.1/standard/image-t:
★ Cost-efficient Kling 2.1 tier

• Price: $0.056/sec — $0.28 per 5s, $0.56 per 10s (audio off).
• End-frame lock: NO (start frame only, image_url).
• Keeps negative_prompt + cfg_scale (full control set).
• High-quality image-to-video at an accessible price; pick this when you don't need an end frame.
user_notes.fal-ai/kling-video/v2.1/pro/image-to-vid:
★ Kling 2.1 Pro — cinematic motion + end-frame lock

• Price: $0.098/sec — $0.49 per 5s, $0.98 per 10s (audio off).
• End-frame lock: YES, via tail_image_url (start = image_url).
• Keeps negative_prompt + cfg_scale (full control set).
• Enhanced visual fidelity, precise camera movement + dynamic motion control vs Standard — good for head-turn with a start/end frame.
user_notes.fal-ai/kling-video/v2.6/pro/image-to-vid:
Kling 2.6 Pro — audio-native

• Price (audio OFF): $0.07/sec — $0.70 per 10s. WITH audio: $0.14/sec ($1.40/10s); with voice control: $0.168/sec ($1.68/10s).
• End-frame lock: YES, end_image_url (start = start_image_url).
• Keeps negative_prompt; DROPS cfg_scale.
• Native audio generation; only pay the audio premium if you actually enable it.
user_notes.fal-ai/kling-video/v2/master/image-to-vi:
☆ Kling 2.0 Master — PRICEY, legacy

• Price: $0.28/sec — $1.40 per 5s, $2.80 per 10s. 4× the cost of 2.5 Turbo Pro.
• End-frame lock: NO (start frame only).
• Keeps negative_prompt + cfg_scale.
• Older flagship; newer 2.5/3.0 tiers are cheaper AND better. Skip unless you specifically want the 2.0 Master look.
user_notes.fal-ai/kling-video/v1.6/pro/image-to-vid:
☆ Kling 1.6 Pro — legacy

• Price: $0.098/sec — $0.98 per 10s (same rate as 2.1 Pro).
• End-frame lock: YES, tail_image_url.
• Keeps negative_prompt + cfg_scale.
• Superseded by 2.x/3.x — use only for back-compat / matching an older shoot.
user_notes.fal-ai/kling-video/v1.5/pro/image-to-vid:
☆ Kling 1.5 Pro — legacy

• Price: $0.10/sec — $1.00 per 10s.
• End-frame lock: YES, tail_image_url.
• Keeps negative_prompt + cfg_scale.
• Oldest tier still listed; superseded by 2.x/3.x.
user_notes.fal-ai/kling-video/o3/standard/image-to-:
Kling O3 Standard — start/end-frame interpolation

• Price: $0.084/sec — $0.84 per 10s (audio off). Same rate as 3.0 Standard.
• End-frame lock: YES, end_image_url (start = image_url).
• DROPS negative_prompt AND cfg_scale (less control than V3 Standard).
• Animates the transition between a start + end frame with text-driven guidance.
user_notes.fal-ai/hunyuan-video-image-to-video:
Hunyuan Video (original I2V)

• Price: $0.40 FLAT per video — billed per clip, NOT per second (default 720p / 129 frames / 16:9).
• End-frame lock: NO.
• High-quality Hunyuan I2V; the v1.5 endpoint is newer + per-second.
user_notes.fal-ai/bytedance/seedance/v1/pro/image-t:
Seedance 1.0 Pro — ByteDance flagship i2v (Jun 2025)

• Token-based: $3.0/1M tokens. Cost/10s by resolution → 480p ~$0.29 · 720p ~$0.65 · 1080p ~$1.46. Default 1080p.
• Resolution is selectable (480p/720p/1080p); pick lower to cut cost ~5× (480p vs 1080p).
• End-frame lock: YES, end_image_url (start = image_url).
• NO negative_prompt, NO cfg_scale, NO audio.
• Extras: camera_fixed, seed, enable_safety_checker. Durations 2–12s (default 5).
user_notes.fal-ai/bytedance/seedance/v1/pro/fast/im:
Seedance 1.0 Pro Fast — cheapest 1.0 tier

• Token-based: $1.0/1M tokens. Cost/10s by resolution → 480p ~$0.10 · 720p ~$0.22 · 1080p ~$0.49. Default 1080p. Deprecated Lite redirects here.
• Resolution selectable (480p/720p/1080p) — the budget pick at any res.
• End-frame lock: NO (start frame only, image_url).
• NO negative_prompt, NO cfg_scale, NO audio.
• Extras: camera_fixed, seed, enable_safety_checker. Durations 2–12s (default 5).
user_notes.fal-ai/bytedance/seedance/v1.5/pro/image:
Seedance 1.5 Pro — audio-capable, 720p default (Dec 2025)

• Token-based: $1.2/1M tokens audio-OFF, $2.4/1M audio-ON. Cost/10s audio-OFF → 480p ~$0.12 · 720p ~$0.26 · 1080p ~$0.58 (≈2× with audio). Default 720p.
• Resolution selectable (480p/720p/1080p); audio doubles the rate.
• End-frame lock: YES, end_image_url (start = image_url).
• Audio: YES (generate_audio, default ON). NO negative_prompt, NO cfg_scale.
• Extras: camera_fixed, seed, enable_safety_checker. Durations 4–12s (default 5).
user_notes.bytedance/seedance-2.0/image-to-video:
Seedance 2.0 — premium, audio-included, up to 15s + 4k (Apr 2026)

• Token-based: $14/1M tokens (≤1080p), $8/1M (4k). Cost/10s by resolution → 480p ~$1.34 · 720p ~$3.02 · 1080p ~$6.80 · 4k ~$15.55. Default 720p. Audio free.
• Resolution selectable (480p/720p/1080p/4k) — the ONLY tier with 4k. 480p is ~56% cheaper than the default 720p.
• End-frame lock: YES, end_image_url (start = image_url).
• Audio: YES (generate_audio, default ON). NO negative_prompt, NO cfg_scale.
• Extras: bitrate_mode (standard/high). Durations 4–15s + auto (default 5). The most expensive tier per pixel.
user_notes.bytedance/seedance-2.0/fast/image-to-vid:
Seedance 2.0 Fast — lower latency, 720p cap (Apr 2026)

• Token-based: $14/1M tokens. Cost/10s → 480p ~$1.34 · 720p ~$3.02. Caps at 720p (NO 1080p). Default 720p. Audio free.
• Resolution selectable (480p/720p); 480p is ~56% cheaper than 720p.
• End-frame lock: YES, end_image_url (start = image_url).
• Audio: YES (generate_audio, default ON). NO negative_prompt, NO cfg_scale.
• Extras: bitrate_mode. Durations 4–15s + auto (default 5).
user_notes.bytedance/seedance-2.0/mini/image-to-vid:
Seedance 2.0 Mini — cheapest 2.0 tier, 720p cap (Apr 2026)

• Token-based: $7/1M tokens. Cost/10s → 480p ~$0.67 · 720p ~$1.51. Caps at 720p (NO 1080p). Default 720p. Audio free.
• Resolution selectable (480p/720p) — the budget 2.0 pick.
• End-frame lock: YES, end_image_url (start = image_url).
• Audio: YES (generate_audio, default ON). NO negative_prompt, NO cfg_scale.
• Durations 4–15s + auto (default 5).
